name: Coygimwch Dell Patagonia (Prawn Patagonia)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the small cauliflower until the florets are soft but still firm.
2. Break the florets and add a dessertspoonful to individual serving dishes or an oven-safe dish. Keep hot.
3. Make a pint of Bechamel sauce using Welsh butter, achieving a Panada consistency.
4. Add cream, tomato ketchup, garlic salt, celery salt, ground bay leaf, turmeric, mustard powder, and a little freshly ground pepper to the sauce. Beat well.
5. Add the peeled prawns and crumbled Caerphilly cheese, then gently heat.
6. Do not boil the mixture.
7. Pour over the cauliflower and grill until golden brown.
8. Pipe creamed potatoes around the individual portions.
